Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka seems to be having fun too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 13 3 1 6}I don't know why, but I feel so calm when I have someone reading next to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}[n]have improved thanks to the[n]skillful expression in the writing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}It's getting pretty late. Should we wrap up for the night?[n]{f 1 1}
